notes: All active split entries are real CWA O-A0059-001 events; demo placeholders are prohibited by schema.
Events are split by non-overlapping weather windows, never by random frames.
Weather-regime labels remain radar candidates until official CWA context is attached.
Minxiong/Chiayi test events remain isolated from training and validation.
